name: larena/licensing
description: Larena Licensing: Runtime licensing layer that decides which package, bundle and capability features are available to a site, with signed entitlement snapshots, trial restrictions, subscription/expiration policies, environment-aware licenses, limits and explainable locks.

scripts.test: php tests/Unit/CapabilityContractTest.php && php tests/Unit/LicensingFailsClosedTest.php && php tests/Unit/LicensingCapabilityDecisionRuntimeTest.php && php tests/Unit/LicensingCapabilityDecisionFailsClosedTest.php
scripts.test:unit: php tests/Unit/CapabilityContractTest.php && php tests/Unit/LicensingFailsClosedTest.php && php tests/Unit/LicensingCapabilityDecisionRuntimeTest.php && php tests/Unit/LicensingCapabilityDecisionFailsClosedTest.php
